zh.lifeSummary: 當Alfonso Jordan Count of Toulouse and Tripoli於1103年出生在巴勒斯坦時，他的父親Raymond IV de Toulouse58歲，母親Countess Elvira Alfonso de Castille and Leon25歲。他於1125年9月16日與Faydide d'Uzès在法國福朗-可特艾尤拉圖勞勒-a奧結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1148年4月27日在以色列享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alfonso Jordan Count of Toulouse and Tripoli于1103年出生在巴勒斯坦时，他的父亲Raymond IV de Toulouse58岁，母亲Countess Elvira Alfonso de Castille and Leon25岁。他于1125年9月16日与Faydide d'Uzès在法国福朗-可特艾尤拉圖勞勒-a奧结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1148年4月27日在以色列享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jordan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, French (mainly Alsace and Haute-Savoie), Polish, Czech, and Slovenian; Spanish and Hungarian (Jordán): from the Christian personal name or nickname Jordan. This is taken from the name of the river Jordan (Hebrew Yarden, a derivative of yarad ‘to go down’, i.e. to the Dead Sea). At the time of the Crusades it was a common practice for crusaders and pilgrims to bring back flasks of water from the river in which John the Baptist had baptized people, including Christ himself, and to use it in the christening of their own children. As a result Jordan became quite a common personal name.

variants.name: Giordano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Rocco, Antonio, Pasquale, Carmine, Vito, Domenic, Gaetano, Giuseppe, Sal, Santo.
Italian: from the personal name Giordano, an equivalent of Jordan .

variants.name: Jourdan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Dominique, Gabrielle, Henri, Lucien, Pierre, Raoul, Yves.
English: variant of   Jordan  .
French (mainly southern): variant of   Jourdain  , a cognate of 2 below.

variants.name: Jourdain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Henri, Pierre, Fritz, Hans, Jacques, Rommel.
French, Breton (mainly Finistère), and West Indian (mainly Haiti, also Martinique and Dominican Republic): from the French personal name Jourdain, an equivalent of Jordan .
English (London, Derbyshire): French-influenced variant of   Jordan  ; compare 1 above.

variants.name: Jordison
meanings: English (North Yorkshire, Durham, and Northumberland): from a Middle English pet form, Jordi, of the male personal name Jordan + -son, or directly from a phonetic shortening of Jordanson.

variants.name: Jorden
meanings: English: variant of   Jordan  .
North German (mainly Jörden): probably a variant of Jordan . Compare Yerden and Yerdon .

variants.name: Judd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Judde, Jutte, a pet form of Jordan .
German: variant of   Jude  .

variants.name: Jorda
meanings: Catalan (Jordà): from the personal name Jordà (see Jordan ).

variants.name: Jerden
meanings: English: from a variant of the personal name Jurdon, an old form of Jordan .

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

variants.name: Jordon
meanings: English: variant of   Jordan  .

nameMeanings.name: Alfonso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Visigothic: probably a compound of adal ‘noble’ + funs ‘ready’; a traditional royal name.

variants.name: Alonso
meanings: Variant of   Alfonso .

en.lifeSummary: When Alfonso Jordan Count of Toulouse and Tripoli was born in 1103, in Palestine, his father, Raymond IV de Toulouse, was 58 and his mother, Countess Elvira Alfonso de Castille and Leon, was 25. He married Faydide d'Uzès on 16 September 1125, in Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 27 April 1148, in Israel, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alfonso Jordan Count of Toulouse and Tripoli est né en 1103, à Palestine, son père, Raymond IV de Toulouse, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Countess Elvira Alfonso de Castille and Leon, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Faydide d'Uzès le 16 septembre 1125, à Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 27 avril 1148, à Israël, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alfonso Jordan Count of Toulouse and Tripoli 1103 in Palästina geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raymond IV de Toulouse 58 und seine Mutter Countess Elvira Alfonso de Castille and Leon 25. Er hat am 16. September 1125 in Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, Frankreich Faydide d'Uzès geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. April 1148 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Israel.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alfonso Jordan Count of Toulouse and Tripoli è nato il nel 1103 nel Palestina, il suo padre, Raymond IV de Toulouse, aveva 58 anni e il suo madre, Countess Elvira Alfonso de Castille and Leon, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Faydide d'Uzès il 16 settembre 1125, nel Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 27 aprile 1148, nel Israele, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alfonso Jordan Count of Toulouse and Tripoliが1103年にパレスチナで生まれた時，父Raymond IV de Toulouseは58歳，母Countess Elvira Alfonso de Castille and Leonは25歳であった。1125年9月16日にフランスフランチェ-コムトeジュラトウロウセ-レ-チaテアウでFaydide d'Uzèsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1148年4月27日にイスラエルで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alfonso Jordan Count of Toulouse and Tripoli(이)가 1103년 팔레스타인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raymond IV de Toulouse(은)는 58세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Elvira Alfonso de Castille and Leon(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1125년 9월 16일 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 라 토우루세-레-cha테오에서 Faydide d'Uzès(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1148년 4월 27일 이스라엘에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alfonso Jordan Count of Toulouse and Tripoli nasceu em 1103, em Palestina, seu pai, Raymond IV de Toulouse, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Countess Elvira Alfonso de Castille and Leon, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Faydide d'Uzès em 16 de setembro de 1125, em Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 27 de abril de 1148, em Israel, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alfonso Jordan Count of Toulouse and Tripoli родился в 1103 г. в местности Палестина, его отцу по имени Raymond IV de Toulouse было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Elvira Alfonso de Castille and Leon, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Faydide d'Uzès 16 сентября 1125 г. в местности тоулоусе-ле-чaто, джура, фрэнче-комтe, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 27 апреля 1148 г. в местности Израиль в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alfonso Jordan Count of Toulouse and Tripoli nació en 1103, en Palestina, su papá, Raymond IV de Toulouse, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Countess Elvira Alfonso de Castille and Leon, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Faydide d'Uzès el 16 de septiembre de 1125, en Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 27 de abril de 1148, en Israel, a la edad de 45 años.
